title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
problem_statement: Maximize profit from a single buy-sell transaction on stock prices by choosing one day to buy and one later day to sell.

examples.explanation: Buy on day 2 (price 1) and sell on day 5 (price 6) for profit 5.

intuition: Track the minimum buy price seen so far and compute the maximum profit with each possible sell day.

approaches.name: Single pass tracking
approaches.description: Iterate once, update the lowest price and calculate the best possible profit at each step.
approaches.why_not: Brute force checks all pairs in O(n^2) but the best trade depends only on the minimum past price.

interview_qa.q: Why is a single pass enough?
interview_qa.a: Keeping the lowest buy price and current maximum profit is sufficient to evaluate every sell day.
The algorithm returns 0 because no positive profit opportunity exists.
